title: PATIKIL Small Cash Box, 4 Pcs Money Holder Metal Tin Box Cash Tray Money Organizer Case for Cash Ticket Credit Card Check Gift, Silver
features: Material: Tinplate; Color: Silver; Size: 17 x 9 x 1.5 cm / 6.7 x 3.5 x 0.6 inch; Package Includes: Tinplate Cash Box x 4
Advantage: The box has a smooth surface and can be decorated with items such as stickers on the surface of the box. Small and spacious, it can easily organize your cash and other valuables.
Instruction: Put cash, coins, jewelry, passports, and cards into the box, hide away, and keep them safe.

Application: This metal cash box is made of quality tinplate material with a smooth surface and elegant design. Its sturdy structure ensures the safe storage of your jewelry, cash, coins, checks, and receipts. In addition to using it for yourself, you can also fill the box with cash and give it to friends.
Note: Please make sure the size meets your requirements before ordering.
